title: Fore’er victorious cross
publicDomainBasis: Horatius Bonar (1808–1889), James McGranahan (1840–1907). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Fore’er victorious cross!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
All foes meet total loss!
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
O’er Hades’ fierceness hurled,
O’er hateful, churning world,
O’er flesh’s powers unfurled—
Boast triumphant in the cross!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
The cross is life to me.
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
It grants authority.
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
Self, feelings, rise in vain;
Earth’s powers can’t remain;
All enemies are slain!
Overcoming by the cross!

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
This banner, joyfully—
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
I’ll raise eternally—
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
My weakness turns to might,
Depression to delight,
Dark gloom to glory bright—
Liberated by the cross!
